Blogs from elsewhere

In addition to the posts of my site*, I have also written for other publications.

  • Edinburgh Open Research Conference 2024 (Edinburgh Research Data Blog), 2024
  • Research skills for Nuffield Research Placements (Open Research in the Classroom), 2023
  • My experience with Edinburgh BioQuarter’s STEM Clubs (Edinburgh BioQuarter), 2021

*Okay, there’s nothing posted on this site so far, but bear with me!
